svg.metadata:
{"type":"seqgraph","mermaid":"sequenceDiagram participant Boot as Proxy.start() participant Strategy as CertStrategy participant Store as CertStore participant Timer as Renewal Timer participant Server as HTTPS Server Boot->>Strategy: provision(fCallback) Strategy->>Strategy: loadOrGenerate CA and leaves Strategy->>Store: updateContext(host, key, cert, ca) Store-->>Strategy: ok Strategy-->>Boot: fCallback(null) Boot->>Server: listen(port) Boot->>Timer: setInterval(checkAndRenew, 12h) loop every 12 hours Timer->>Strategy: checkAndRenew(fCallback) Strategy->>Strategy: inspect cached cert expiry alt needs renewal Strategy->>Strategy: re-issue cert Strategy->>Store: updateContext(host, newKey, newCert, ca) end Strategy-->>Timer: fCallback(null) end Note over Server,Store: In-flight handshakes
always read the current
cert store -- no restart needed ","style":"notebook"}
